properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v3 v4 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God will not reject your prayer Praying makes you stronger I have never seen the righteous forsaken Begging for bread, and left to suffer Have patience, just wait and see What God will do When you lift up your hands and surrender God will pull you through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh worship Simply worship If you are crying, worship In your trials, worship If you are hurting, worship Nothing matters, worship He will hear your praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God goes before you saying, "Let there be" He's healing your wounds and setting you free He's sending His angels, fighting from all sides He's leading the way, yes, He is the Guide Trust in Him, He will never fail He'll walk with you along life's rugged trail Just lift up your hands, this is your victory day and give Him the praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Worship the Lord Worship the Lord (repeat x 4)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It is important to understand When God is speaking Sometimes He may seem to be silent But that is when He is working Have patience just wait and see what God will do When you lift up your hands and surrender God will pull you through

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh worship Simply worship If you are crying, worship In your trials, worship If you are hurting, worship Nothing matters, worship He will hear your praise

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: God goes before you saying, "Let there be" He's healing your wounds and setting you free He's sending His angels, fighting from all sides He's leading the way, yes, He is the Guide Trust in Him, He will never fail He'll walk with you along life's rugged trail Just lift up your hands, this is your victory day and give Him the praise

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Worship the Lord Worship the Lord (repeat x 4)
